bullets.text: Q3 combined ratio of 90.3; YTD CR remained sub-90; Property CR of 102.3 for Q3, including about 6 points from Hurricane Florence; companywide NPW surpassed $30 billion on a trailing 12-month basis.
Q3 net premiums written grew 20%, with YTD growth at 21%; Progressive crossed the $30 billion NPW threshold, adding $10 billion since the $20 billion milestone celebrated in 2015.
Company surpassed 20 million companywide PIFs, 13 million auto PIFs, 2 million decade-long customers, and 1 million Robinsons during Q3; bundled home/auto PIFs up nearly 30% year over year.
Personal auto frequency continued to decline within the industry while severity rose; year-over-year average premiums still rising but at a slower pace than the prior 18 months.

New product model 8.5 live in 15 states covering 40% of countrywide written premium; BusinessQuote Explorer soft-launched in September with three partner carriers; Snapshot mobile algorithm for distracted driving piloted.
Portfolio quoting pilot launched for agents in Missouri in August; Agency channel bundled home/auto PIFs up more than 40% YTD over 2017; HQX buy online now available in about half of online quotes.
Issued $550 million in 10-year senior notes at 4.00% in October; total debt-to-capital ratio remains below 30% ceiling; investment portfolio returned 1.2% for Q3, led by 7.4% equity performance.

Hurricane Florence impacted Property results by approximately 6 points on Q3 CR; new Nashville CAT center mobilized; over 300 employees deployed for Hurricane Michael, with photo estimating used for expedient claims settlement.

All Progressive Personal Lines products converted to PolicyPro modern policy processing system; 1.5 billion miles collected via Snapshot mobile app since inception; new Snapshot distracted-driving algorithm piloted.
